title: La pie voleuse
overview: Maria, who's not as young as she used to be and who helps people older than her, is living from hand to mouth. She can't quite accept her precarious situation and steals a few euros here and there from all those lovely people she looks after with such devotion, and who adore her for it… But after an accusation of abuse of a vulnerable person, Maria winds up in police custody.

trailers.title: LA PIE VOLEUSE Bande Annonce (2025) Ariane Ascaride, Jean-Pierre Darroussin
